inputs.label: Velocity (km/s)
inputs.businessContext: Enter the velocity of the moving object in kilometers per second.

inputs.label: Proper Time (s)
inputs.businessContext: Enter the proper time interval in seconds, i.e., the time experienced by the moving observer.

inputs.label: Speed of Light (m/s)
inputs.businessContext: Enter the speed of light in meters per second (default is vacuum speed).

inputs.label: Output Time Unit Factor
inputs.businessContext: Enter the conversion factor to convert the dilated time from seconds to desired unit (e.g., 1 for seconds, 1/60 for minutes, 1/3600 for hours).
